messages.content: Hi! I think we missed our call Friday! I sent you a message on WhatsApp. Would love to reschedule this weekâjust let me know your availability! :)
Hi I sent you a WhatsApp! :)
Sounds great Iâll send you a message today!
Sounds great. Whatâs a good phone number for you? I can send along a google meet invite and we can find a time this week!
Yes I would be more than happy to join a call and chat sometime
Hi! Happy weekend! Just following up!

Okay no Reddit yet or alternative IG pages? Have you thought about OFTV? Are you based in the US? Would love to hop on a call at some point to answer any questions you have and go over some of our processes and how we handle our agency. Most our creators do between 30 and 100 k per month but some do much more.
That makes sense and where is most your traffic to the page coming from? Instagram?
Yes I have and itâs been okay but as far as management goes itâs just been steady nothing crazy last month I made 10k and this month I got to 20k
Hi yes our managers are all female :) . Howâs your account doing in terms of revenue per month? And have you worked with management before?
Yes I am interested. Female account management you say?

Hey! Love the content. I actually manage some of the top creators on OF and Telegram (mostly within the top 1% and some in the top .1%)! We specialize in 360 marketing and work with a select group of niche creators and other creators we know we can scale. What are you doing for marketing right now? We manage a bunch of platforms, which most agencies donât do. This includes full chat team and managers, IG, Reddit, X, Telgram and we do OFTV creation and content houses every month or two. Would love to talk about you joining our team. You have a great page and I think we could scale you a lot. Plus we have a competitive commission scale. Let me know if you want to setup a phone call or group chat with my team to discuss what we can do! We have all female account management as well and our teams based between Palm Beach and LA! Let me know if you have any questions. Would love to talk more!
